description: HFI Systems - Deye SUN-5K Dual Inverter Monitoring v2

targets.rawSql:
SELECT MAX(time) as time,
  AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name='Inverter_1' THEN pv1_power + COALESCE(pv2_power,0) END)
  + AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name='Inverter_2' THEN pv1_power + COALESCE(pv2_power,0) END) as total_pv
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote} 
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('minute', time)
ORDER BY 1 DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
  MAX(time) as time,
  SUM(grid_power) as total_grid_power
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('minute', time)
ORDER BY 1 DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT NOW() as time,
  SUM(max_pv) as today_pv
FROM (
  SELECT inverter_name, MAX(daily_pv_energy) as max_pv
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND daily_pv_energy BETWEEN 0.01 AND 9000
  GROUP BY inverter_name
) sub

SELECT
  NOW() as time,
  CASE
      WHEN '${calc_mode}' = 'flat' THEN ROUND((kwh * ${rate}::numeric)::numeric, 2)
      ELSE ROUND((
        CASE
          WHEN kwh <= 0   THEN 0
          WHEN kwh <= 100 THEN kwh * 2.9790
          WHEN kwh <= 400 THEN 100*2.9790 + (kwh-100)*3.4864
          WHEN kwh <= 650 THEN 100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + (kwh-400)*3.7983
          ELSE                        100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + 250*3.7983 + (kwh-650)*4.0948
        END * 1.15
      )::numeric, 2)
    END as grid_cost_rand
FROM (
  SELECT MAX(daily_grid_import) as kwh
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE inverter_name = 'Inverter_1'
  AND time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg'
  AND daily_grid_import BETWEEN 0.01 AND 9000
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
) t

SELECT NOW() as time,
  ROUND(
    CASE WHEN load_kwh > 0
    THEN LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, (1 - grid_kwh / NULLIF(load_kwh, 0)) * 100))
    ELSE 0 END
  ::numeric, 1) as self_sufficiency_pct
FROM (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(MAX(daily_load_energy), 1) as load_kwh,
    COALESCE(MAX(daily_grid_import), 0) as grid_kwh
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE inverter_name = 'Inverter_1'
  AND time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg'
  AND daily_load_energy > 0
  AND daily_load_energy < 9000
  AND daily_grid_import < 9000
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
) t

SELECT MAX(time) as time,
  AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name='Inverter_1' THEN load_power END)
  + AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name='Inverter_2' THEN load_power END) as total_load
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote} 
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('minute', time)
ORDER BY 1 DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
  NOW() as time,
  CASE
      WHEN '${calc_mode}' = 'flat' THEN ROUND((pv_kwh * ${rate}::numeric)::numeric, 2)
      ELSE ROUND((
        CASE
          WHEN pv_kwh <= 0   THEN 0
          WHEN pv_kwh <= 100 THEN pv_kwh * 2.9790
          WHEN pv_kwh <= 400 THEN 100*2.9790 + (pv_kwh-100)*3.4864
          WHEN pv_kwh <= 650 THEN 100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + (pv_kwh-400)*3.7983
          ELSE                        100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + 250*3.7983 + (pv_kwh-650)*4.0948
        END * 1.15
      )::numeric, 2)
    END as solar_savings_rand
FROM (
  SELECT SUM(max_pv) as pv_kwh
  FROM (
    SELECT inverter_name, MAX(daily_pv_energy) as max_pv
    FROM solar_readings
    WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
    AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
    AND daily_pv_energy BETWEEN 0.01 AND 9000
    GROUP BY inverter_name
  ) inv
) t

SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS time,
  AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name='Inverter_1' THEN pv1_power + COALESCE(pv2_power,0) END) as inv1_pv,
  AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name='Inverter_2' THEN pv1_power + COALESCE(pv2_power,0) END) as inv2_pv,
  AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name='Inverter_1' THEN pv1_power + COALESCE(pv2_power,0) END)
  + AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name='Inverter_2' THEN pv1_power + COALESCE(pv2_power,0) END) as total_pv
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote} 
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS time,
  AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name='Inverter_1' THEN battery_soc END) as battery_soc,
  (AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name='Inverter_1' THEN battery_power END)
  + AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name='Inverter_2' THEN battery_power END)) * -1 as total_batt_power
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS time,
  AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name='Inverter_1' THEN load_power END) as inv1_load,
  AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name='Inverter_2' THEN load_power END) as inv2_load,
  AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name='Inverter_1' THEN load_power END)
  + AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name='Inverter_2' THEN load_power END) as total_load
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote} 
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS time,
  AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name='Inverter_1' THEN grid_power END)
  + AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name='Inverter_2' THEN grid_power END) as grid_power,
  AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name='Inverter_1' THEN grid_voltage END) as grid_voltage
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS time,
  AVG(grid_frequency) as grid_frequency
FROM solar_readings
WHERE inverter_name = 'Inverter_1'
AND $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  
AND grid_frequency BETWEEN 45 AND 55
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS time,
  AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name='Inverter_1' AND inverter_temp < 100 THEN inverter_temp END) as inv1_temp,
  AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name='Inverter_2' AND inverter_temp < 100 THEN inverter_temp END) as inv2_temp,
  AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name='Inverter_1' AND battery_temp IS NOT NULL AND battery_temp > 0 THEN battery_temp END) as batt_temp,
  AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name='Inverter_1' AND dc_temp < 100 THEN dc_temp END) as inv1_dc_temp,
  AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name='Inverter_2' AND dc_temp < 100 THEN dc_temp END) as inv2_dc_temp
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

WITH daily AS (
  SELECT
    DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg')::text as day,
    MAX(daily_grid_import) as kwh
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE inverter_name = 'Inverter_1'
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND time > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days'
  AND daily_grid_import BETWEEN 0.01 AND 9000
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
  day,
  CASE
      WHEN '${calc_mode}' = 'flat' THEN ROUND((kwh * ${rate}::numeric)::numeric, 2)
      ELSE ROUND((
        CASE
          WHEN kwh <= 0   THEN 0
          WHEN kwh <= 100 THEN kwh * 2.9790
          WHEN kwh <= 400 THEN 100*2.9790 + (kwh-100)*3.4864
          WHEN kwh <= 650 THEN 100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + (kwh-400)*3.7983
          ELSE                        100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + 250*3.7983 + (kwh-650)*4.0948
        END * 1.15
      )::numeric, 2)
    END as grid_cost_rand
FROM daily ORDER BY day

WITH daily AS (
  SELECT
    day,
    SUM(max_pv) as pv_kwh
  FROM (
    SELECT
      DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg')::text as day,
      inverter_name,
      MAX(daily_pv_energy) as max_pv
    FROM solar_readings
    WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days'
    AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
    AND daily_pv_energy BETWEEN 0.01 AND 500
    GROUP BY 1, 2
  ) sub
  GROUP BY day
)
SELECT
  day,
  CASE
      WHEN '${calc_mode}' = 'flat' THEN ROUND((pv_kwh * ${rate}::numeric)::numeric, 2)
      ELSE ROUND((
        CASE
          WHEN pv_kwh <= 0   THEN 0
          WHEN pv_kwh <= 100 THEN pv_kwh * 2.9790
          WHEN pv_kwh <= 400 THEN 100*2.9790 + (pv_kwh-100)*3.4864
          WHEN pv_kwh <= 650 THEN 100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + (pv_kwh-400)*3.7983
          ELSE                        100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + 250*3.7983 + (pv_kwh-650)*4.0948
        END * 1.15
      )::numeric, 2)
    END as solar_savings_rand
FROM daily ORDER BY day

WITH daily AS (
  SELECT
    day,
    SUM(CASE WHEN type='grid' THEN val ELSE 0 END) as grid_kwh,
    SUM(CASE WHEN type='pv'   THEN val ELSE 0 END) as pv_kwh
  FROM (
    SELECT
      DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') as day,
      'grid' as type,
      MAX(daily_grid_import) as val
    FROM solar_readings
    WHERE inverter_name = 'Inverter_1'
    AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
    AND time > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
    AND daily_grid_import BETWEEN 0.01 AND 500
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
      DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') as day,
      'pv' as type,
      MAX(daily_pv_energy) as val
    FROM solar_readings
    WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
    AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
    AND daily_pv_energy BETWEEN 0.01 AND 500
    GROUP BY 1, 2
  ) src
  GROUP BY day
)
SELECT
  day::timestamp + INTERVAL '12 hours' as time,
  CASE
      WHEN '${calc_mode}' = 'flat' THEN ROUND((grid_kwh * ${rate}::numeric)::numeric, 2)
      ELSE ROUND((
        CASE
          WHEN grid_kwh <= 0   THEN 0
          WHEN grid_kwh <= 100 THEN grid_kwh * 2.9790
          WHEN grid_kwh <= 400 THEN 100*2.9790 + (grid_kwh-100)*3.4864
          WHEN grid_kwh <= 650 THEN 100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + (grid_kwh-400)*3.7983
          ELSE                        100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + 250*3.7983 + (grid_kwh-650)*4.0948
        END * 1.15
      )::numeric, 2)
    END as "Grid Cost (R)",
  CASE
      WHEN '${calc_mode}' = 'flat' THEN ROUND((pv_kwh * ${rate}::numeric)::numeric, 2)
      ELSE ROUND((
        CASE
          WHEN pv_kwh <= 0   THEN 0
          WHEN pv_kwh <= 100 THEN pv_kwh * 2.9790
          WHEN pv_kwh <= 400 THEN 100*2.9790 + (pv_kwh-100)*3.4864
          WHEN pv_kwh <= 650 THEN 100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + (pv_kwh-400)*3.7983
          ELSE                        100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + 250*3.7983 + (pv_kwh-650)*4.0948
        END * 1.15
      )::numeric, 2)
    END   as "Solar Savings (R)"
FROM daily ORDER BY day

panels.title: Daily Grid Cost vs Solar Savings — Last 30 Days

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  (DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg'))::timestamp as time,
  DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg')::text as day,
  MAX(daily_pv_energy)         as "PV Generated",
  MAX(daily_load_energy)       as "Load Consumed",
  MAX(daily_grid_import)       as "Grid Import",
  MAX(daily_battery_charge)    as "Batt Charge",
  MAX(daily_battery_discharge) as "Batt Discharge"
FROM solar_readings
WHERE inverter_name = 'Inverter_1'
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND time > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days'
GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  (DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg'))::timestamp as time,
  DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg')::text as day,
  MAX(daily_pv_energy)         as "PV Generated",
  MAX(daily_load_energy)       as "Load Consumed",
  MAX(daily_grid_import)       as "Grid Import",
  MAX(daily_battery_charge)    as "Batt Charge",
  MAX(daily_battery_discharge) as "Batt Discharge"
FROM solar_readings
WHERE inverter_name = 'Inverter_2'
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND time > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days'
GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  time,
  inverter_name,
  battery_soc,
  battery_voltage,
  ROUND(battery_power::numeric, 0) as battery_power_w,
  battery_temp,
  pv1_power,
  pv2_power,
  load_power,
  grid_power as grid_power_raw,
  ROUND((grid_power * 0.001)::numeric, 2) as grid_power_kw,
  grid_voltage,
  grid_frequency,
  inverter_temp,
  dc_temp,
  poll_success
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 50

SELECT NOW() as time,
  COALESCE(MAX(inv1_pv + COALESCE(inv2_pv,0)), 0) as peak_pv_w
FROM (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) as t,
    AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name='Inverter_1' THEN pv1_power + COALESCE(pv2_power,0) END) as inv1_pv,
    AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name='Inverter_2' THEN pv1_power + COALESCE(pv2_power,0) END) as inv2_pv
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote} 
  GROUP BY 1
) sub

SELECT NOW() as time,
  COALESCE(MAX(inv1_load + COALESCE(inv2_load,0)), 0) as peak_load_w
FROM (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) as t,
    AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name='Inverter_1' THEN load_power END) as inv1_load,
    AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name='Inverter_2' THEN load_power END) as inv2_load
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  
  GROUP BY 1
) sub

SELECT NOW() as time,
  COUNT(*) as failed_polls
FROM solar_readings
WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND poll_success = false

SELECT NOW() as time,
  SUM(daily_pv) as month_pv_kwh
FROM (
  SELECT
    DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') as day,
    inverter_name,
    MAX(daily_pv_energy) as daily_pv
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') = DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg')
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND daily_pv_energy BETWEEN 0.01 AND 9000
  GROUP BY 1, 2
) sub

SELECT NOW() as time,
  SUM(CASE
      WHEN '${calc_mode}' = 'flat' THEN ROUND((kwh * ${rate}::numeric)::numeric, 2)
      ELSE ROUND((
        CASE
          WHEN kwh <= 0   THEN 0
          WHEN kwh <= 100 THEN kwh * 2.9790
          WHEN kwh <= 400 THEN 100*2.9790 + (kwh-100)*3.4864
          WHEN kwh <= 650 THEN 100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + (kwh-400)*3.7983
          ELSE                        100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + 250*3.7983 + (kwh-650)*4.0948
        END * 1.15
      )::numeric, 2)
    END) as month_grid_cost
FROM (
  SELECT
    DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') as day,
    MAX(daily_grid_import) as kwh
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE inverter_name = 'Inverter_1'
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND DATE_TRUNC('month', time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') = DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg')
  AND daily_grid_import BETWEEN 0.01 AND 9000
  GROUP BY 1
) sub

SELECT NOW() as time,
  SUM(CASE
      WHEN '${calc_mode}' = 'flat' THEN ROUND((pv * ${rate}::numeric)::numeric, 2)
      ELSE ROUND((
        CASE
          WHEN pv <= 0   THEN 0
          WHEN pv <= 100 THEN pv * 2.9790
          WHEN pv <= 400 THEN 100*2.9790 + (pv-100)*3.4864
          WHEN pv <= 650 THEN 100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + (pv-400)*3.7983
          ELSE                        100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + 250*3.7983 + (pv-650)*4.0948
        END * 1.15
      )::numeric, 2)
    END) as month_solar_savings
FROM (
  SELECT
    DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') as day,
    inverter_name,
    MAX(daily_pv_energy) as pv
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') = DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg')
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND daily_pv_energy BETWEEN 0.01 AND 9000
  GROUP BY 1, 2
) sub

SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS time,
  AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name='Inverter_1' THEN grid_power END) as inv1_grid,
  AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name='Inverter_2' THEN grid_power END) as inv2_grid,
  AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name='Inverter_1' THEN grid_power END)
  + AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name='Inverter_2' THEN grid_power END) as total_grid
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote} 
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg')::text as day,
  MAX(daily_battery_charge) as charge_kwh,
  MAX(daily_battery_discharge) as discharge_kwh
FROM solar_readings
WHERE inverter_name = 'Inverter_1'
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND time > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days'
AND daily_battery_charge < 9000
AND daily_battery_discharge < 9000
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  NOW() as time,
  pv2_voltage as value,
  'Inv 1 PV2 V' as metric
FROM solar_readings
WHERE inverter_name = 'Inverter_1'
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT
  NOW() as time,
  pv2_current as value,
  'Inv 1 PV2 A' as metric
FROM solar_readings
WHERE inverter_name = 'Inverter_1'
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT
  NOW() as time,
  pv2_power as value,
  'Inv 1 PV2 W' as metric
FROM solar_readings
WHERE inverter_name = 'Inverter_1'
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS time,
  AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name = 'Inverter_1' THEN pv1_power ELSE NULL END) as "Inv 1 PV1",
  AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name = 'Inverter_1' THEN pv2_power ELSE NULL END) as "Inv 1 PV2",
  AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name = 'Inverter_2' THEN pv1_power ELSE NULL END) as "Inv 2 PV1",
  AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name = 'Inverter_2' THEN pv2_power ELSE NULL END) as "Inv 2 PV2"
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote} 
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: PV String Power — All Active Strings

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS time,
  AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name = 'Inverter_1' THEN pv1_voltage ELSE NULL END) as "Inv 1 PV1",
  AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name = 'Inverter_1' THEN pv2_voltage ELSE NULL END) as "Inv 1 PV2",
  AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name = 'Inverter_2' THEN pv1_voltage ELSE NULL END) as "Inv 2 PV1",
  AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_name = 'Inverter_2' THEN pv2_voltage ELSE NULL END) as "Inv 2 PV2"
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote} 
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: PV String Voltages — All Active Strings

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  day::date::timestamp as time,
  day,
  SUM(max_pv)          as "PV Generated",
  SUM(max_load)        as "Load Consumed",
  SUM(max_grid)        as "Grid Import",
  SUM(max_batt_charge) as "Batt Charge",
  SUM(max_batt_dis)    as "Batt Discharge"
FROM (
  SELECT
    DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg')::text as day,
    inverter_name,
    MAX(daily_pv_energy)         as max_pv,
    MAX(daily_load_energy)       as max_load,
    MAX(daily_grid_import)       as max_grid,
    MAX(daily_battery_charge)    as max_batt_charge,
    MAX(daily_battery_discharge) as max_batt_dis
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days'
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND daily_pv_energy > 0
  GROUP BY 1, 2
) sub
GROUP BY day
ORDER BY day

SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS time,
  AVG(battery_current) as battery_current,
  AVG(battery_voltage) as battery_voltage
FROM solar_readings
WHERE inverter_name = 'Inverter_1'
AND $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS time,
  AVG(battery_current) as battery_current,
  AVG(battery_voltage) as battery_voltage
FROM solar_readings
WHERE inverter_name = 'Inverter_2'
AND $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT site_name FROM solar_readings ORDER BY site_name
list.label: Site
list.name: site
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT site_name FROM solar_readings ORDER BY site_name

title: SolarWatch — Solar Monitoring
